reviews.review_body: When I visited this place it was like administration is more behind money no in quality eduacation. I was surprised day 1 and never wanted to suggest any

reviews.author: Anand sharma
reviews.review_body: Great place to learn good teachers & staff

reviews.author: Yash Chera
reviews.review_body: One of the worst schools ever. The standards of the school doesn’t match with their advertisements or the school fees. Teachers are always support the kid who gets good grades and ignore the ones who really need help. They tend to accuse the students who get average grades for every disturbance in class even though its false. There were incidents of kids being bullied but teachers don’t seem to solve it and try involving in personal issues rather than focus on school stuff. The worst batch was 2018, students tend to target 3-4 students and insulted them and ignored for no cause. Called them ugly and mentally troubled them. The best moment was to get out of that school and never see them again in my life.

reviews.author: Shashindra Chegoor
reviews.review_body: This school offlate has denigrated its standards and since last couple of months the teaching and student/ward standards has touched its abyss. Sorry to say even he students  are not taken seriously and they are conducted at whims and fancies and also the reviews. . Sorry but have lost all expectations and hopes

reviews.author: Rajesh Jain
reviews.review_body: After great efforts and visiting several schools finalised BOLTON school for my kids 3 years back. Looking back am happy about my choice and My Kids just love their school.
